strict_win_deltas.delta: P2 separates input parsing, rule loading, event validation, calculation, and JSON error writing into dedicated functions, while P1 concentrates these concerns in runPayout.
P2 converts both payout-rule file read/parse failures into JSON errors via readJsonFile, whereas P1 reads and parses payout-rules.json without error handling.
P2 validates configured payout-rule fields and requires safe-integer event amounts, while P1 directly trusts rule values and accepts any Number.isInteger amount.
P2 adds the payout command and example to the shared usage text and centralizes JSON error output in writePayoutError, while P1 adds neither usage entry nor a centralized exception path.
